message:
chore(gitignore): add ephemeral beads file patterns

Add .bv.lock and .br_history/ patterns to .beads/.gitignore to prevent
accidental commits of beads viewer lock files and command history.

These are machine-specific runtime artifacts that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,3 +32,9 @@ beads.left.jsonl
 beads.left.meta.json
 beads.right.jsonl
 beads.right.meta.json
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock
